name: Tides (2018)
description: Tidal modulator (2018 redesign). Digital function generator: AD envelope, cyclic VC-LFO/VCO, or AR envelope across three ranges (1/8 Hz, 2 Hz, 130.8 Hz). Shape/slope/smoothness/shift are CV. Four outputs re-interpreted by output mode. CLOCK input for PLL sync.

controls.name: Frequency
controls.description: Coarse frequency, spanning ±4 octaves around the centre value of the selected range. When CLOCK is patched, sets the integer multiplier/divider against the clock.
controls.detail: Slow: ~1/8 Hz centre · Mid: 2 Hz centre · Fast: 130.8 Hz (audio) centre

controls.name: Shape
controls.description: Morphs the waveshape of the ascending and descending segments from exponential through linear to logarithmic.
controls.detail: CCW: expo · noon: linear · CW: log · bipolar CV via SHAPE attenuverter

controls.name: Slope
controls.description: Asymmetry / attack-vs-decay ratio between the rising and falling segments of each cycle.
controls.detail: CCW: fast attack / slow decay · noon: symmetric · CW: slow attack / fast decay

controls.name: Smoothness
controls.description: CCW applies low-pass filtering (smooths toward sine); CW applies wavefolder distortion. Drastically reshapes spectrum.
controls.detail: CCW: LPF smoothing · noon: raw segments · CW: wavefolded harmonics

controls.name: Shift/Level
controls.description: Dual-purpose knob whose function depends on the selected output mode (attenuverter, output selector, time-shift, or frequency-ratio).
controls.detail: Mode 0: output attenuverter · Mode 1: crossfaded output routing · Mode 2: phase/apex shift · Mode 3: inter-output frequency ratio (12 o'clock = unison)

controls.name: Range Button
controls.description: Selects one of three frequency ranges. LED indicates which range is active.
controls.detail: 1/8 Hz (slow/movements) · 2 Hz (rhythms and modulations) · 130.8 Hz (audible tones)

controls.name: Mode Button
controls.description: Selects the ramp/envelope behaviour of the generator.
controls.detail: AD: one-shot unipolar envelope (TRIG starts attack–decay) · Cyclic: free-running bipolar oscillator/LFO · AR: one-shot unipolar envelope with sustained attack while gate high, release on gate low

controls.name: Output Mode Button
controls.description: Cycles the relationship between the four outputs, re-interpreting the SHIFT/LEVEL knob and CV.
controls.detail: 0 Different shapes · 1 Different amplitudes (dispatch/crossfade) · 2 Different times (apex shift) · 3 Different frequencies (polyrhythmic / just-intonation ratios)

controls.name: Frequency CV Attenuverter
controls.description: Scales and inverts the FREQUENCY FM CV input. The V/OCT jack is always 1V/oct and unattenuated.

controls.name: Shape Attenuverter
controls.description: Scales and inverts the SHAPE CV input.

controls.name: Slope Attenuverter
controls.description: Scales and inverts the SLOPE CV input.

controls.name: Smoothness Attenuverter
controls.description: Scales and inverts the SMOOTHNESS CV input.

controls.name: Shift/Level Attenuverter
controls.description: Scales and inverts the SHIFT CV input (mode-dependent like the knob).

inputs.name: TRIG
inputs.description: Trigger/gate. AD: rising edge resets envelope to 0V and starts attack–decay. Cyclic: edges reset oscillator phase (hard-sync). AR: gate high raises to +8V, gate low releases to 0V.

inputs.name: CLOCK
inputs.description: External clock input. Locks the module to the clock's frequency; FREQUENCY knob becomes a multiplier/divider (1/16x – 16x). At audio rates an algorithm prioritises pitch accuracy over phase alignment.

inputs.name: V/OCT
inputs.description: 1V/octave pitch input, precalibrated and unattenuated. Separate from the FREQUENCY FM jack.

inputs.name: FREQUENCY CV
inputs.description: Exponential frequency modulation input, scaled by its attenuverter.

inputs.name: SHAPE CV
inputs.description: Shape modulation, scaled by the SHAPE attenuverter.

inputs.name: SLOPE CV
inputs.description: Slope/asymmetry modulation, scaled by the SLOPE attenuverter.

inputs.name: SMOOTHNESS CV
inputs.description: Smoothness modulation, scaled by the SMOOTHNESS attenuverter.

inputs.name: SHIFT CV
inputs.description: Modulates the SHIFT/LEVEL parameter; behaviour depends on the selected output mode (attenuates, dispatches across outputs, shifts apex in time, or detunes the four outputs).

outputs.name: OUT 1
outputs.description: Mode 0: main processed signal. Mode 1: receives crossfaded signal when SHIFT targets it. Mode 2: reference (unshifted) output. Mode 3: fundamental frequency.

outputs.name: OUT 2
outputs.description: Mode 0: raw asymmetric triangle (pre-smoothness). Mode 1/2/3: second tap of the SHIFT-controlled dispatch / time-shift / frequency-ratio spread.

outputs.name: OUT 3
outputs.description: Mode 0: end-of-attack gate. Mode 1/2/3: third tap of the SHIFT-controlled dispatch / time-shift / frequency-ratio spread.

outputs.name: OUT 4
outputs.description: Mode 0: end-of-release gate. Mode 1/2/3: fourth tap of the SHIFT-controlled dispatch / time-shift / frequency-ratio spread.

behaviors.name: AD envelope mode
behaviors.description: TRIG fires a unipolar AD envelope (0V → +8V → 0V). SHAPE morphs expo/lin/log, SLOPE sets attack-vs-decay ratio, SMOOTHNESS smooths or folds the shape. Retriggerable at any point.

behaviors.name: AR envelope mode
behaviors.description: Gate at TRIG drives a unipolar AR envelope: gate high → attack to +8V and hold; gate low → release to 0V. SLOPE controls attack-vs-release ratio.

behaviors.name: Cyclic oscillator / LFO mode
behaviors.description: Free-running bipolar generator. In the 130.8 Hz range it tracks V/OCT as a VCO; in slow and mid ranges it's a complex LFO. SMOOTHNESS CCW smooths to sine, CW wavefolds into harmonics.

behaviors.name: Output Mode 0 — Different shapes
behaviors.description: OUT 1 is the main signal. OUT 2 is the raw asymmetric triangle before smoothness. OUT 3 is an end-of-attack gate. OUT 4 is an end-of-release gate. SHIFT/LEVEL acts as a bipolar attenuverter on the main signal.

behaviors.name: Output Mode 1 — Different amplitudes (dispatch)
behaviors.description: The signal is routed across OUT 1–4 with smooth crossfading controlled by SHIFT/LEVEL. Sweeping SHIFT moves the envelope/LFO from one output to the next — great for quadraphonic panning or sequential VCA triggers.

behaviors.name: Output Mode 2 — Different times (apex shift)
behaviors.description: OUT 1 is the reference waveform; OUT 2–4 are progressively time-shifted copies whose apex/phase SHIFT/LEVEL moves. Great for quadrature-style motion or tap-delayed envelopes.

behaviors.name: Output Mode 3 — Different frequencies (ratios)
behaviors.description: OUT 1–4 run at frequency ratios set by SHIFT/LEVEL. At 12 o'clock all four are unison; turning the knob spreads them into polyrhythmic LFOs or just-intonation chords.

behaviors.name: External clock sync (PLL)
behaviors.description: Tides locks to the CLOCK input's frequency. With TRIG unpatched it generates an envelope per clock tick in phase with it; with TRIG patched it adjusts envelope duration to the clock rate. FREQUENCY knob selects a 1/16x–16x ratio.

behaviors.name: Hard sync (TRIG in cyclic mode)
behaviors.description: TRIG edges reset the oscillator phase, enabling classic hard-sync timbres when driven by an external sub-oscillator or sequenced reset.

behaviors.name: End-of-attack / end-of-release gates
behaviors.description: OUT 3 pulses at the end of the attack segment and OUT 4 at the end of the release segment — handy for chaining envelopes, ratcheting sequencers, or triggering secondary events.

patchIdeas.name: Quadraphonic dispatch panner
patchIdeas.patch: Cyclic mode · Mid range · Output Mode 1 (Different amplitudes) · slow LFO on SHIFT CV sweeps the signal through OUT 1–4 · feed each output to a VCA on a different speaker/channel
patchIdeas.diagram:
Tides:
* Range: Mid (2 Hz)
* Mode: Cyclic
* Output Mode: 1 (Different amplitudes)

- LFO (Out) >> Tides (SHIFT CV)
- Tides (OUT 1) >> VCA A (CV)
- Tides (OUT 2) >> VCA B (CV)
- Tides (OUT 3) >> VCA C (CV)
- Tides (OUT 4) >> VCA D (CV)

patchIdeas.name: Percussive voice with end-of-attack accent
patchIdeas.patch: AD mode · Output Mode 0 · SHAPE full CCW (expo) · SLOPE 10 o'clock (snappy) · OUT 1 shapes main VCA · OUT 3 (end-of-attack gate) triggers a second VCA for a click/accent layer · clock into TRIG
patchIdeas.diagram:
Tides:
* Range: Slow
* Mode: AD
* Output Mode: 0 (Different shapes)

- Clock (Out) t> Tides (TRIG)
- VCO (Out) -> Filter (In)
- Filter (Out) -> VCA Main (In)
- Tides (OUT 1) >> VCA Main (CV)
- Tides (OUT 3) t> VCA Click (Gate) // end-of-attack accent
- Noise (Out) -> VCA Click (In)

patchIdeas.name: Just-intonation four-voice drone
patchIdeas.patch: Fast range · Cyclic mode · Output Mode 3 (Different frequencies) · SMOOTHNESS full CCW (sines) · SHIFT knob spreads OUT 1–4 into harmonic ratios · mix all four for additive drone
patchIdeas.diagram:
Tides:
* Range: Fast (130.8 Hz)
* Mode: Cyclic
* Output Mode: 3 (Different frequencies)
* Smoothness: CCW (sine)

- Keyboard (Pitch) p> Tides (V/OCT)
- Tides (OUT 1) -> Mixer (In 1)
- Tides (OUT 2) -> Mixer (In 2)
- Tides (OUT 3) -> Mixer (In 3)
- Tides (OUT 4) -> Mixer (In 4)
- Mixer (Out) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Clock-locked polyrhythmic LFO
patchIdeas.patch: Mid range · Cyclic mode · Output Mode 3 · master clock into CLOCK jack sets base rate · FREQUENCY knob picks a division · SHIFT spreads OUT 1–4 into poly-rhythmic ratios synced to tempo
patchIdeas.diagram:
Tides:
* Range: Mid
* Mode: Cyclic
* Output Mode: 3 (Different frequencies)

- Clock (Out) c> Tides (CLOCK) // PLL sync
- Tides (OUT 1) >> Filter A (Cutoff)
- Tides (OUT 2) >> Filter B (Cutoff)
- Tides (OUT 3) >> VCA Pan (CV)
- Tides (OUT 4) >> FX Send (CV)

patchIdeas.name: Quadrature-style modulation from apex shift
patchIdeas.patch: Slow range · Cyclic mode · Output Mode 2 (Different times) · SHIFT around 2 o'clock spreads OUT 2–4 as delayed copies of OUT 1 · patch into four modulation destinations for correlated but phase-shifted motion
patchIdeas.diagram:
Tides:
* Range: Slow
* Mode: Cyclic
* Output Mode: 2 (Different times)

- Tides (OUT 1) >> VCO FM (CV)
- Tides (OUT 2) >> Filter (Cutoff)
- Tides (OUT 3) >> VCA Pan L (CV)
- Tides (OUT 4) >> VCA Pan R (CV)

patchIdeas.name: AR gate-controlled envelope with release flag
patchIdeas.patch: AR mode · Output Mode 0 · gate from sequencer into TRIG · OUT 1 opens main VCA (attacks while gate high, releases on gate low) · OUT 4 (end-of-release) retriggers a reverb send or next event
patchIdeas.diagram:
Tides:
* Range: Slow
* Mode: AR
* Output Mode: 0 (Different shapes)

- Sequencer (Gate) g> Tides (TRIG)
- Tides (OUT 1) >> VCA (CV)
- VCO (Out) -> Filter (In) -> VCA (In)
- Tides (OUT 4) t> Reverb Send (Gate) // fires when release ends

patchIdeas.name: Folded bass VCO
patchIdeas.patch: Fast range · Cyclic mode · SMOOTHNESS full CW (wavefolded harmonics) · V/OCT from sequencer · SHAPE CV from envelope adds dynamic expo bite · OUT 1 into filter for waveshaped bass with evolving folds
patchIdeas.diagram:
Tides:
* Range: Fast
* Mode: Cyclic
* Output Mode: 0
* Smoothness: CW (wavefold)

- Sequencer (Pitch) p> Tides (V/OCT)
- Envelope (Out) >> Tides (SHAPE CV)
- Tides (OUT 1) -> Filter (In)
- Filter (Out) -> VCA (In)
- Envelope (Out) >> VCA (CV)

patchIdeas.name: Hard-sync lead
patchIdeas.patch: Fast range · Cyclic mode · external sub-VCO at fixed pitch into TRIG forces phase reset · V/OCT sweeps freely · SMOOTHNESS at noon · SHAPE CV from envelope · classic aggressive sync-lead timbre
patchIdeas.diagram:
Tides:
* Range: Fast
* Mode: Cyclic
* Output Mode: 0

- Sequencer (Pitch) p> Tides (V/OCT)
- Sub VCO (Out) t> Tides (TRIG) // hard sync
- Envelope (Out) >> Tides (SHAPE CV)
- Tides (OUT 1) -> Filter (In) -> VCA (In) -> Output (In)
